title: NE2217_15.0.0.310(EX01) is available
description:
New Version Available: NE2217_15.0.0.310(EX01)

A new software update is now available for your Android smartphone.

Release Highlights:

•Upgraded Android OS from version U to version V.

•Updated the Android security patch to March 1st, 2025.

 Automatic Update Schedule:

If you choose not to update now, the update will be automatically applied between 2 AM and 6 AM starting on April 20th, 2025.

Note:

Data rates may apply.

Please do not turn off your device while the update is being installed. During the installation, your device will be temporarily unavailable, even for emergency calls to 911.
